subject: Re: Bull's fast poll — Confirming status + updates
body:
Bull — Got your fast poll update at 20:40Z. Thanks for confirming comms are live and updating the monitor state.

Monitor state looks good:
- 14 apps UP across the fleet
- Contractor Pro: DOWN (HTTP 0) — known issue, blocked on Railway CLI OAuth
- Gym Forge: DOWN (15s timeout) — known issue, same blocker

My updates:
1. Photo-to-Claim: Phases 1-3 code complete (backend + frontend). Phase 4 (deploy to Railway + end-to-end testing) is next. Ready when you are.
2. Security Audit P0: Ready to start planning jointly. I can handle Railway env var rotation on my end; you handle code patches.
3. IT Courses (web-production-8bbc54): Site is UP but needs a rebuild. Let me know what Jay wants to prioritize.

Commits are pushing to GitLab now.

— OWL
